title: TBI Compliance Attestation
description: Per-artifact Trust Before Intelligence attestation. One sidecar file `<artifact>.tbi.json` per AI artifact. Validated in CI by scripts/tbi_compliance_check.py and scored by execution/ops_platform/tbi_compliance.py. Required by CLAUDE.md before any AI artifact ships.

artifact_id.description: Stable id of the AI artifact this attestation covers (e.g. 'agent:project_architect').

artifact_path.description: Repo-relative path to the artifact this attestation covers.

framework_version.description: TBI framework snapshot version this attestation was made against. Must equal CURRENT_FRAMEWORK_VERSION in tbi_compliance.py, else the artifact must be re-attested after a framework refresh.

inpact.description: All six INPACT dimensions. Each must be 'satisfied' or 'n_a' (with evidence).

goals.description: All five GOALS targets. Each must be 'satisfied' or 'n_a' (with evidence).

layers.description: Which of the 7 trust layers this artifact relies on, and how each is satisfied.

trust_score_ref.description: Optional capability_id to pull a live trust_engine profile for runtime artifacts.

verdict.description: Self-declared verdict. The scorer independently recomputes it; CI fails on 'non_compliant' (declared or computed).

evidence.description: How the dimension is satisfied, or why it is not applicable. Required (non-empty) when status is 'n_a'.
